site.welcomeText: Your digital guest guide — everything you need during your stay in the beautiful Lefkada!
site.address: Demo Old Town Alley 4, Lefkada, Greece
site.heroAlt: Illustrated hero view for Old Town Studio

navCards.title: Neighborhood
navCards.subtitle: Supermarket, pharmacy, ATM, bakery and fuel.

wifi.title: WiFi Information
wifi.notes: Demo Wi-Fi credentials for the third property.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.arrival: Self-check-in after 16:00. Use the blue lockbox beside the gate. The keybox code will be sent to you privately before your arrival. Please check your booking messages.
accommodation.keybox: The backup keybox is next to the small wooden side door.
accommodation.map: Access the studio from the old-town alley and use the guide map for the easiest walking route.
accommodation.checkout: Check-out is at 11:00. Place the keys on the kitchen counter.
accommodation.late_checkout: Late check-out can be arranged only when the calendar is free.
accommodation.air_condition: Use eco mode overnight to reduce noise.
accommodation.bbq: No BBQ is available at this city property.
accommodation.water: Tap water is fine for washing but bottled water is recommended for drinking.
accommodation.hot_water: Turn the water heater on for 20 minutes before showering in winter.
accommodation.breakfast: Coffee capsules and biscuits are available in the studio.
accommodation.consumables: Please leave kitchen equipment and extension cables inside the studio.

house_rules.title: House Rules
rules: Respect neighbors in the shared staircase.
Please switch off the heater when leaving.

transport.title: Transportation
transport.info: The old town is walkable and taxis can stop at the square two minutes away.

restaurants.title: Restaurants & Cafes
restaurants.intro: Demo recommendations around the old town studio.

attractions.title: Local Attractions
attractions.intro: Suggested sights around the third property.

supermarket.title: Supermarket
supermarket.text: Corner market is 2 minutes away by foot.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy
pharmacy.text: Pharmacy is near the central square.

atm.title: ATM
atm.text: ATM is next to the bakery on the main street.

bakery.title: Bakery
bakery.text: Bakery opens early and is famous for sesame pies.

gas.title: Gas Station
gas.text: Closest fuel station is on the ring road outside town.
